Container.Name: PlexLibrarian
Container.Overview: Library health insights for your Plex server. Find stale content, track viewing patterns, and reclaim disk space. Includes a Sign in with Plex setup wizard — or set PLEX_URL and PLEX_TOKEN to skip OAuth entirely.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Plex Librarian web UI.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Directory where the SQLite database is stored. Map this to a persistent location on your Unraid array.

Config.Name: Plex URL
Config.Description: Optional. URL of your Plex Media Server (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:32400). Set this together with Plex Token to bypass the OAuth setup wizard.

Config.Name: Plex Token
Config.Description: Optional. Your Plex authentication token. Set this together with Plex URL to bypass the OAuth setup wizard.

Config.Name: Database Path
Config.Description: Full path inside the container where the SQLite database file lives. Only change this if you have a specific reason to.

Config.Name: qBittorrent URL
Config.Description: Optional power-user override. qBittorrent Web UI URL reachable from this container. Configure qBittorrent in the web UI instead for multiple instances.

Config.Name: qBittorrent Username
Config.Description: qBittorrent Web UI username. Leave blank only when authentication bypass trusts this container.

Config.Name: qBittorrent Password
Config.Description: qBittorrent Web UI password. Leave blank only when authentication bypass trusts this container.

Config.Name: Library Sync Concurrency
Config.Description: Max number of libraries synced in parallel. Kept low by default to avoid competing with Plex for resources on the same host — only raise this on dedicated hardware.

Config.Name: Fetch Concurrency
Config.Description: Max concurrent Plex page requests per library. Kept low by default to avoid competing with Plex for resources on the same host — only raise this on dedicated hardware.

Config.Name: Sync Stall Timeout (minutes)
Config.Description: Abort a sync if it reports no progress for this many minutes — e.g. the Plex server going offline mid-sync. Only raise this if you have a very slow or high-latency Plex connection triggering false positives.

Config.Name: Log Retention (days)
Config.Description: Days to keep sync history and activity feed entries before they're automatically deleted. Raise this to retain history longer, or set to 0 to keep them forever.
